item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 5min Don't Tell Jack is much too good for Tramore rivals irishracing.com Don't Tell Jack
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 5min Don't Tell Jack is much too good for Tramore rivals irishracing.com Don't Tell Jack is much too good for Tramore rivals Well-backed from early shows of 13/2, Don't Tell Jack easily accounted for nine rivals in the Adare Manor Opportunity Maiden Hurdle. 136

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min Connections of Touleen are not ruling out a tilt at the 1,000 Guineas despite her defeat
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min Connections of Touleen are not ruling out a tilt at the 1,000 Guineas despite her defeat on Saturday, but are open to the possibility that her best chance of Classic glory this year may come at beyond a mile
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 1 1 1 mil
